sections.title: The Diverted Ward
sections.what: Theo confirms the second patient is deteriorating on the cut ward. He stands at his locker, complaint still unsigned.

sections.title: The Resuscitation
sections.what: Maeve runs the bay. She catches a near-error — barely. Only she knows why her hands weren't steady.

sections.title: The Long Walk
sections.what: Reza walks the admin corridor alone toward the board-member attending. One long, uninterrupted hallway.

sections.title: Threshold
sections.what: Maeve stabilizes her patient. Reza refuses the board's quiet offer on the record. Same line, two crossings.

sections.title: 5:51 a.m.
sections.what: The second patient dies. Theo gets the call. The complaint is still in his locker.

sections.title: 6:04 a.m.
sections.what: Theo submits the complaint. No ceremony. He sends it and sits down.

sections.title: The Machine
sections.what: Hospital legal and operations begin moving within the hour. Harte is informed before dawn.
